# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source qualifies as an institute-worthy preprint with empirical evaluation claims.

## Why

The source is an arXiv research manuscript and the abstract reports a concrete system, comparative evaluation against baseline single-agent approaches, and qualitative results on a real codebase. That clears the admission bar for empirical substance at the curator stage even though the excerpt does not provide the full result tables.

## Limits
